headline: Is GE’s (GE) Rejected Defense Report Proposal Revealing Management’s True Geopolitical Risk Strategy?
summary: On May 5, 2026, General Electric Company held its annual meeting of stockholders and later reported that a shareholder proposal requesting a report on defense-related products was not approved. This outcome keeps GE Aerospace’s defense operations on their current course, leaving investors to focus on how defense-related decisions intersect with growing international engagement and policy scrutiny. Next, we’ll examine how Larry Culp’s participation in high-level U.S.-China trade talks may...

headline: Musk, Cook Set to Join Trump for Xi Summit, White House Says
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The White House is inviting Tesla Inc.’s Elon Musk, Apple Inc.’s Tim Cook, Boeing Co.’s Kelly Ortberg and executives from other large companies to accompany President Donald Trump on his trip to China this week, according to an official. summary: GE stock surges on strong aerospace demand and major engine deals, but high debt, rising costs and rich valuation may limit upside.

headline: Nvidia CEO Huang not going to China during Trump visit, source says
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is not going to Beijing ‌during President Donald Trump's trip to China ‌this week, a person familiar with the matter said on Monday.  Huang ​was not invited, the source said, with the White House focusing more on agriculture and commercial aviation matters, such as orders for Boeing planes, on the ‌current trip.  A number of CEOs ⁠were expected to travel with Trump to help drum up business for U.S. companies, a top priority ​for his ​administration.

headline: Elon Musk Joins Trump's China Trip — Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Not Invited

headline: Trump invites Elon Musk, Tim Cook, Larry Fink and other CEOs to join China trip for Xi summit
summary: Trump invited Tesla's Elon Musk, Apple's Tim Cook and Blackrock's Larry Fink to join his China trip for talks with Xi Jinping on trade, AI and geopolitics.
